module_sme_rollup.name: Asset Foundation & Registry
module_sme_rollup.description: Establish complete asset master data with unique identification, hierarchy, classification, and lifecycle tracking.

statements.text: Generate unique asset identifiers with barcode/RFID and organize in hierarchical structure by ownership and location.
Classify assets by category, class, criticality, and technical specifications including serial number and manufacturer.
Track asset custodian, physical location, status, and lifecycle state from acquisition through disposal with audit trail.
Record warranty, service contracts, and supporting documents linked to each asset.
Auto-create asset records from purchase documents and capitalize with pro-rata depreciation on acquisition date.

module_sme_rollup.name: Financial Management & Valuation
module_sme_rollup.description: Manage asset depreciation, valuation, and financial reporting with full accounting integration.

statements.text: Support multiple depreciation methods with separate book and tax schedules in one record.
Automatically post depreciation entries to general ledger at period close with daily pro-rata calculation.
Record asset impairment, revaluation, and disposal with full audit trail and accounting impact.
Report accumulated depreciation and net book value by asset, class, and cost center.
Track lease contracts with automatic right-of-use asset and liability calculation on commencement.

module_sme_rollup.name: Maintenance Execution & Work Management
module_sme_rollup.description: Plan, schedule, and execute preventive and corrective maintenance with full work order lifecycle control.

statements.text: Auto-generate work orders from preventive maintenance plans on time, usage, or condition-based triggers.
Create reusable preventive maintenance templates with tasks, parts, labour estimates, and scheduling rules.
Create work orders for corrective, preventive, inspection, and project maintenance with approval workflows.
Assign work orders to technicians, reserve spare parts, record labour time, and capture failure codes on closure.
Enable non-maintenance users to submit service requests via portal with triage and conversion to work orders.
Execute task checklists within work orders with pass/fail validation and photo/signature capture.

module_sme_rollup.name: Condition Monitoring & Predictive Maintenance
module_sme_rollup.description: Capture asset condition data and automatically trigger maintenance based on thresholds and trends.

statements.text: Capture condition measurements from manual entry, barcode scanning, and IoT sensors with timestamp.
Configure independent warning and critical thresholds per measurement type and auto-create work orders on breach.
Track vibration, temperature, pressure, flow, and downtime with historical trends and analysis charts.
Send email, SMS, and in-app alerts when equipment fails or measurements breach thresholds with escalation.

module_sme_rollup.name: Spare Parts & Inventory Management
module_sme_rollup.description: Manage spare parts inventory with stock control, reservations, and consumption tracking.

statements.text: Maintain spare parts catalogue with alternate and substitute parts across multiple storerooms with bin-level precision.
Enforce minimum and maximum stock levels with automatic reorder point alerts and replenishment requisitions.
Reserve spare parts against planned work orders and link issue/return transactions directly to work orders.
Track lot and serial numbers for spare parts and record consumption history per asset for trend analysis.

module_sme_rollup.name: Analytics, Compliance & Operations
module_sme_rollup.description: Monitor maintenance performance, ensure regulatory compliance, and optimize asset operations.

statements.text: Calculate and report MTBF, MTTR, OEE, and maintenance cost breakdown by labour, parts, and contractors.
Report preventive maintenance compliance, backlog, and downtime analysis by failure code and root cause.
Schedule inspections with configurable frequencies and execute checklists with pass/fail outcomes and remedial actions.
Manage permit-to-work and lockout-tagout workflows with complete audit trail of who, when, and what.
Define SLA terms per asset, calculate real-time uptime, compute penalties/bonuses, and exclude planned downtime.
Record energy consumption per asset, calculate carbon emissions, and detect anomalies outside baseline.

Platform & Data.narrative: This family ensures your asset data is accessible, secure, and connected across your organisation. Your maintenance teams need to access asset information from the field on their phones, your finance team needs to pull depreciation data, and you must comply with Singapore's PDPA regulations. Without it, you'll have siloed data, security risks, and difficulty integrating with other systems like your accounting software or IoT sensors.

Asset Register & Lifecycle.narrative: This is your single source of truth for every asset your business owns—from machinery to vehicles to IT equipment—tracking it from purchase through retirement and calculating its tax and book value. Singapore SMEs need this to satisfy ACRA reporting requirements, manage depreciation correctly, and know what assets you actually have. Without it, you'll struggle with tax compliance, lose track of expensive equipment, and can't make informed replacement decisions.

Maintenance Operations.narrative: This family turns maintenance from reactive firefighting into planned, efficient work. You schedule preventive maintenance before equipment breaks, manage spare parts so technicians aren't waiting for stock, and let field teams work offline in remote locations. For a Singapore manufacturing or facilities business, this directly cuts downtime, extends asset life, and reduces emergency repair costs—scenarios like preventing a production line shutdown or managing a building's HVAC maintenance become predictable and cheaper.

Reliability & Compliance.narrative: This family keeps your assets safe, compliant, and healthy by automating inspections, tracking regulatory certifications, and using sensor data to predict failures before they happen. Singapore SMEs in regulated industries (food, pharma, construction, utilities) must pass regular safety and compliance audits; predictive maintenance also saves money by catching wear early. A scenario: your lift certification is due next month, or your production equipment's vibration sensor flags a bearing about to fail—both caught automatically.

Capital & Commercial.narrative: This family links your capital spending (buying new assets) to your asset register, tracks warranty and service contracts so repairs go to the right vendor, and monitors energy use and carbon footprint per asset. Singapore SMEs increasingly face sustainability reporting demands and need to justify capex decisions; if you lease equipment to customers or sell uptime guarantees, you also need to track SLAs. A scenario: you commission a new CNC machine and need to track its warranty coverage, or you need to report Scope 1 emissions from your fleet.

Analytics & Intelligence.narrative: This family turns raw maintenance and asset data into dashboards and reports that show you what's working, what's failing, and where to invest next. You see KPIs like mean time between failures, maintenance cost per asset, and asset availability—critical for board reporting and operational decisions. For a Singapore SME, this means you can prove ROI on maintenance investments and spot chronic problem assets before they drain your budget.
